meta_title: For Students: Claude Code skills setup to Solve slow development speed (Intermediate Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome slow development speed. A Intermediate-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Claude Code Skills Setup: Accelerate Your Development Speed
content.seo_description: Master Claude Code and Antigravity to eliminate development bottlenecks. A high-impact, intermediate-level tutorial designed for student developers.
content.answer_block: To overcome slow development, integrate Claude Code with Antigravity to automate boilerplate and context-aware refactoring. By leveraging Claude's terminal-based reasoning alongside Antigravity's workflow optimization, you shift from manual coding to architectural orchestration. This setup minimizes context switching, allowing you to ship production-ready features in hours instead of days.
content.intro:
You stare at the blinking cursor, the weight of a 'simple' feature request feeling like a mountain of technical debt. The gap between your vision and your execution speed is the silent killer of every student project. You aren't lacking talent; you are lacking the high-leverage tooling that separates hobbyists from professional software architects.

Today, we close that gap. By mastering the synergy between Claude Code and Antigravity, you transform your terminal from a text interface into a high-octane engineering cockpit. This isn't just about writing code faster; it's about building the muscle memory of a senior engineer who knows how to amplify their output through intelligent automation.

steps.title: Environment Initialization
steps.description: Configure your project workspace to ensure Claude Code has the correct read/write permissions for your directory structure.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze this project structure and generate a .claude-ignore file to optimize token usage for the LLM.

steps.title: Contextual Mapping
steps.description: Map your existing codebase so the AI understands the dependency tree before you begin refactoring.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Map the primary data flow and identify high-complexity files that need refactoring for performance.

steps.title: Automated Boilerplate Generation
steps.description: Stop typing repetitive CRUD code. Use Claude to scaffold your core business logic based on your schema.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a type-safe service layer based on the current database schema, following clean architecture patterns.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "generate service layer for orders"

steps.title: Intelligent Debugging Loop
steps.description: Connect runtime errors directly to Claude's analysis engine to pinpoint root causes in seconds.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the stack trace from the last failed build and propose a fix that maintains existing test coverage.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "fix the runtime exception in the auth module"

steps.title: Refactoring & Optimization
steps.description: Apply professional-grade code cleanup to ensure your project meets industry standards.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the codebase for performance bottlenecks and suggest refactors to improve O(n) complexity in the main loops.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "refactor for performance and readability"

pro_tips: Always use atomic commits when Claude suggests a change; it makes rolling back specific AI-generated logic trivial if a side effect occurs.
Tailor your .claude-ignore file aggressively; excluding node_modules and build artifacts saves significant token costs and improves response relevance.
Use Antigravity to generate 'Architectural Context' files; keeping a summary of your project vision in the root helps Claude maintain consistent design patterns.
Run 'claude map' before every major feature sprint to ensure the AI has the latest state of your local development environment.
Leverage Claude's 'explain' mode on your own code to identify potential edge cases you might have missed during initial development.
content.next_steps: Once your environment is optimized, focus on building a comprehensive test suite for your first feature. Use Claude Code to generate unit tests based on your new service layer, ensuring your project is robust enough for a production deployment.
content.conversion_block: You are now equipped with the same workflow architecture used by top-tier SaaS engineers. Don't let your ideas stay in the 'draft' phase. Take the leap, automate the mundane, and focus on the architecture that matters. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
